label: Agricultural Land Mortgage
defaultCasePattern: land collateral with 7/12, patta, mutation, revenue stamp and income proof
requiredDocuments: Patta/Khasra-Khatauni or local land register extract
checks: Survey number format and edit-region consistency
Area mismatch against demo Bhoomi-style polygon reference
Revenue stamp micro-text and watermark presence
Owner-chain continuity across mutation entries
Income proof plausibility against crop and district baseline
qwenFocus: Explain land-record tampering in branch-underwriter language and cite registrar-style source traces.

label: MSME Working Capital
defaultCasePattern: bank statements, GST summary, invoices, borrower ledger and working-capital projection
checks: Revenue spike outlier against sector baseline
Circular funds and related-party counterparty overlap
Statement total arithmetic and font/template consistency
GST turnover mismatch with bank inflow rhythm
Invoice attachment duplication and metadata reuse
qwenFocus: Explain financial manipulation, circular transaction risk and underwriting materiality with evidence IDs.

label: Retail Home Loan
defaultCasePattern: sale deed, encumbrance certificate, income proof, property visit media and KYC
requiredDocuments: Approved property plan or tax receipt
checks: Sale deed execution date and edit timestamp consistency
Encumbrance text match with declared property
Seller/witness signature baseline comparison
Property media geotag and scene continuity
Income proof continuity and employer/source verification
qwenFocus: Explain sale deed, encumbrance and retail mortgage controls with plain decision support.

label: Corporate Credit
defaultCasePattern: audited statements, board resolution, ROC filings, collateral schedule and guarantor papers
checks: Board resolution signature and seal consistency
ROC field mismatch against submitted corporate records
Balance-sheet arithmetic and ratio outlier detection
Guarantor consent and KYC relationship checks
Valuation report issuer template and timestamp consistency
qwenFocus: Explain corporate-document and financial-statement anomalies with credit committee ready citations.
